---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new board, pet, provider, or other improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to add or change?

A clear description of the feature.

## Type of contribution

- [ ] New board port
- [ ] New pet / sprite
- [ ] New provider support
- [ ] UI / UX improvement
- [ ] Daemon improvement
- [ ] Other

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Implementation idea (optional)

Any thoughts on how to implement it, or constraints to keep in mind.

## Hardware / assets you have access to (if applicable)

e.g. "I have the AMOLED-2.16 C6 board and can test it."
